title: After years of drone warfare, Ukraine is selling its ‘blood experience’ to allies
summary_full: As unmanned aerial vehicles target Israel, Persian Gulf states and U.S. forces in the Middle East, Ukraine is selling equipment, giving advice and establishing joint production lines.
summary_public: As unmanned aerial vehicles target Israel, Persian Gulf states and U.S. forces in the Middle East, Ukraine is selling equipment, giving advice and establishing joint production lines.

UA.label: neutral
UA.evidence: Ukraine is selling its ‘blood experience’ to allies
